verification.detail: Kernel executed on Model/Ascend910B1, verification passed

notes: Golden kernel verified on CANN 9.0.0 simulator in Docker. Single-vector-lane streaming pattern: tile_cols=64 (one Ascend910B1 SIMD lane), host-side zero padding to a multiple of tile_cols, multi-core (CORE_NUM=8) row distribution. Both num_rows and num_cols are runtime int. Test shape (8, 1055) — non-aligned num_cols exercises the host-padding tail path; rescales to (64, 100003) by changing only launcher constants. Tolerances atol=rtol=1e-4. Replaces the asc2.rms_norm builtin form because the user-visible prompt asks for truly dynamic string lengths; replaces the doc-exact column-loop form because MR-85 multi-core SetValueOp is broken (see docs/streaming-rms-norm-status.md).
